title: Student Performance Analysis
text: This project explores how study hours relate to student performance and demonstrates basic data analysis using Python.

title: Student Performance Analysis
text: This project explores how study hours relate to student performance and demonstrates basic data analysis using Python.

title: Student Performance Analysis
text:
Python Code


Code
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

df = pd.DataFrame({
    "StudyHours": [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
    "Score": [50, 55, 65, 72, 85]
})

df









StudyHours
Score




0
1
50


1
2
55


2
3
65


3
4
72


4
5
85









Code
plt.plot(df["StudyHours"], df["Score"], marker="o")
plt.xlabel("Study Hours")
plt.ylabel("Score")
plt.title("Study Hours vs Score")
plt.show()

title: Student Performance Analysis
text:
Reflection
This project helped me practise using Python for data analysis and visualisation. It also improved my understanding of how charts can be used to communicate trends clearly.

title: Monthly Budget Analysis

title: Monthly Budget Analysis
text: This project explores a simple monthly budget using Python.

title: Monthly Budget Analysis
text:
Python Code


Code
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

budget = pd.DataFrame({
    "Category": ["Rent", "Food", "Transport", "Entertainment", "Savings"],
    "Amount": [800, 250, 100, 120, 300]
})

budget









Category
Amount




0
Rent
800


1
Food
250


2
Transport
100


3
Entertainment
120


4
Savings
300









Code
plt.bar(budget["Category"], budget["Amount"])
plt.xlabel("Category")
plt.ylabel("Amount (€)")
plt.title("Monthly Budget Breakdown")
plt.xticks(rotation=30)
plt.show()

title: Monthly Budget Analysis
text:
Reflection
This project helped me practise organising data and creating visualisations using Python.

title: About Me
text:
Academic and Professional Goals
My goal is to continue developing technical and analytical skills that will support both my academic progress and future career opportunities. I want to improve my confidence in presenting projects, solving technical problems, and using digital tools in a professional setting.

title: About Me
text:
What this portfolio represents
This ePortfolio demonstrates not only completed work, but also my progress in learning how to plan, build, refine, and present digital projects effectively.

title: Student Performance Analysis
text:
Objectives

organise data clearly
analyse the relationship between variables
visualise results
reflect on findings

title: Student Performance Analysis
text:
Interpretation
The chart shows a clear positive relationship between study hours and performance. As study time increases, scores also increase.

title: Reflection
text:
Skills Developed
Through this work, I strengthened my understanding of Quarto, Git, GitHub Pages, Python, and web design. I learned how to structure a website properly, manage files in a logical way, and present work in a clearer and more professional format.

title: Reflection
text:
Challenges and Problem-Solving
One of the main challenges I faced was understanding how the different parts of the project fit together, especially when working with page structure, navigation, rendering, and Python execution inside Quarto. I also experienced issues with missing files, formatting errors, and Python package setup.
Working through these problems taught me the importance of patience, testing, and careful troubleshooting. Rather than giving up when errors appeared, I learned to fix them step by step and improve the quality of my work.






Note



A key lesson from this project was that professional digital work is not only about writing content, but also about organisation, presentation, debugging, and revision.

title: Reflection
text:
What I Learned About Myself
This project showed me that I am capable of learning technical tools and applying them in a practical way. It also helped me build confidence in presenting my work more professionally and thinking more critically about how projects are communicated to others.

title: Reflection
text:
Future Goals
In the future, I would like to continue improving my skills in Python, data visualisation, and digital presentation. I also want to build more advanced projects that demonstrate stronger analytical ability and creative problem-solving. These skills will be valuable in both academic work and future career opportunities.

title: About Me
text:
Background

Building this portfolio has strengthened my confidence in using Quarto, GitHub, and Python in a practical context. I developed stronger organisational skills by structuring pages clearly and maintaining consistency across the site.
This process also improved my ability to present academic work in a professional and visually effective format, ensuring that information is clear, accessible, and well-structured.

title: About Me
text:
Strengths






Tip



My key strengths include organisation, adaptability, attention to detail, and problem-solving.
I demonstrated organisation by structuring my portfolio clearly and maintaining consistent styling across pages. I showed adaptability by learning new tools such as Quarto and GitHub and applying them effectively. My attention to detail is reflected in the layout, formatting, and clarity of my work.

title: About Me
text:
Goals
I aim to continue developing my technical and analytical skills, particularly in Python and data visualisation.
In the future, I plan to build more complex data-driven projects and improve my ability to communicate insights clearly. These skills will support both my academic development and progression into a data-focused career.

title: Reflection
text:
What I Learned
Through this project, I developed practical skills in Quarto, Git, GitHub, Python, and web design. I learned how to structure a professional website, organise files correctly, manage changes through version control, and present work in a way that is both clear and visually engaging.

title: Reflection
text:
Challenges I Faced
One of the biggest challenges was understanding how all the technical parts of the portfolio connected together. I had to learn how Quarto uses file structure, page rendering, and YAML configuration to control navigation and layout. I also faced difficulties with broken links, page structure issues, and Python package setup when trying to run code inside project pages.

title: Reflection
text:
How I Solved Problems
Instead of giving up when errors appeared, I worked through them step by step. I tested changes, fixed file structure problems, improved my Quarto configuration, and installed the packages needed for Python execution. This process taught me that technical work often depends on patience, troubleshooting, and attention to detail.






Important



A key lesson from this project is that professional digital work is not only about writing content — it also involves testing, debugging, refining, and presenting work effectively.

title: Reflection
text:
Skills Development
This project strengthened my confidence in: - building and styling a website - managing a project using Git and GitHub - using Python for analysis and visualisation - presenting academic work in a professional format

title: Reflection
text:
Future Application
The skills I developed in this project will be useful in both academic and professional contexts. In the future, I want to build more advanced data analysis projects and continue improving how I communicate technical work. I now feel more confident in using digital tools not just to complete assignments, but to create work that looks polished, purposeful, and professional.
